interface.longDescription: Tanaab-based canon enforcement as a Codex plugin, including installable skills plus a stub MCP registry for future canon resources.
defaultPrompt: Write mocha unit tests for all the util functions in `utils`
Standarize this repo for formatting and structure using $tanaab-javascript-repo-standardizer.
Generate next version release notes in CHANGELOG.md.
Create a new skill using $tanaab-skill-author that can send email via cURL for AgentMail
Generate a bun-based CLI that can check for open PRs on tanaabased/canon
Create a canon approved GitHub Actions release.yml for this repo
